steps.title: Interpret the equation structure
steps.content:
The equation $5.48x + 7.30y = 1,277.94$ represents a revenue model:
$$\text{(price per smaller container)} \cdot x + \text{(price per larger container)} \cdot y = \text{total revenue}$$
In this structure, the coefficient multiplying each variable is the unit price of that item.

steps.title: Extract the unit price of the smaller container
steps.content: Since $x$ represents the number of smaller containers sold, the coefficient 5.48 paired with $x$ must be the price of each smaller container. That matches choice A — A is correct.
